faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in College Of Agricultural Engineering,Bapatla for UG/PG courses?
faqs.answer:
College Of Agricultural Engineering,Bapatla has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:
Courses Eligibility
M.E./M.Tech Candidate must have passed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream and obtained with the above mentioned marks (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from an AICTE/UGC approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto. Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.
B.E. / B.Tech Candidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognized as equivalent there to, from a recognized Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible. Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis. Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana. Candidates should have completed 17 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023) and an upper age limit is 22 years for all the candidates and 25 years in respect of SC/ST candidates as on 31st December of the year of admissions (2023).

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Agriculture Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Very good for education and facilities.

review_content.Placements: 40 students got placement. 4 LPA is the average package. Mahindra and Mahindra, Dodla, and heritage are top recruiters. 90% of agricultural engineering students are getting internships every year in top companies, with many courses and management positions also available.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel contains good infrastructure. 24/7 water and power supply, Wi-Fi with high bandwidth, a student mess, and supportive facilities are available for sports and games. Qualified students can participate in intercollegiate-level tournaments, and good medical facilities are available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Agriculture Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is good in terms of higher education.

review_content.Placements: Our college did not provide placements in 2022. If any student is placed, then the highest package offered ranges between 3 LPA - 4.5 LPA. Our previous batch had placements in marketing, Mahindra, Jain Irrigation, Our Food, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. Our college rating for neatness is 4 out of 5. Our college is very neat. Classrooms are equipped with projectors. The library contains several books for reference. The computer lab contains many labs such as farm equipment labs, a food processing lab, a mini watershed area for demo purposes, etc. Our college provides us with a lot of labs for more learning purposes.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Agriculture Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Review of College Of Agricultural Engineering,Bapatla.

review_content.Placements: The placement cell department of our college has no concern for the future of the students. They never make a single afford to invite the reputed companies which can provide jobs to the students at different pay scales according to their quality and talents. In the last 2 years, only 3 students got placed in the tractor manufacturing sector in the marketing field with the maximum salary package of 3 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our university is one of the top-ranked universities in India. It is affiliated by Indian Council Of Agriculture Research, and our degree programme comes under fifth dean committee. The infrastructure of our college is very good. It provides all kind of facilities for the students to complete their education with minimum troubles. But due to some crept workers or professors, the fund provided by ICAR couldn't reach to the students. The librarians do not issue books to students to study for a period of time. There is a strength of 100 students in a batch. The hostel facility is provided only for 20 boys and 34 girls. The college does not have any sports teacher. ICAR provides Rs. 8,000-9,000 per student for education tour, but the students do not get this money. This college system is running only with their past reputation, and it ruins the future of several students. The college doesn't have a well-managed playground for students. Equipment and apparatus for experiments are in very bad conditions, and chemicals got expired. There is a CCTV camera in every class for security purposes, but they are in non-working conditions.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Agriculture Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: The college provides practical learning knowledge with good placements.

review_content.Placements: My course was agricultural engineering, and my grade points were 8.1 out of 10. Companies like ITC, Pioneer, Johndeer and Mahindra were hiring for internships. We were a batch of 2014-2018 with a strength of 75 students. Toppers GP was around 8.7, and the lowest GP was 5.2. The top recruiting company was Mahindra and Mahindra Ltd. I got placed there with a salary package of 6 LPA, and it is the highest package offered in our college. Totally 45 students were placed in companies such as Sonalika, Mahindra Swaraj Tractor Companies, and in government projects like ZBNF, Micro Irrigation, RDT, Village agriculture Assistants.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Agriculture Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: You'll like college if you're interested in practical knowledge and passionate about agriculture.

review_content.Placements: Everyone will be definitely placed in various companies from the past 5 years. There are almost 100% placements. Every student will get internships in the 2nd and 3rd year for 1-month in various companies and also central institutes. There will be an in-plant training programme for a period of 2 and a half month in the final year.
review_content.Infrastructure: All classrooms are digitally equipped and there is free internet facility around the college and also in the hostels. The labs are equipped with each and every required equipment and machinery. There is a library with all the needed books. College buildings are old but hostels are new ones.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Agriculture Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Really a worthy college to join. If you really has love towards agriculture.

review_content.Placements: Almost everyone (45 out of 75) got placed in companies. Remaining students have went for further studies and some are preparing for government. jobs. The highest package is from Mahindra tractors 5 LPA. But, average salary 20k/month by Jain irrigation, Eicher.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs and libraries technically are very good. Hostel, classrooms are excellent. Students die for sports here. Everyone is a sportsperson & seniors give a lot of support juniors. No canteen is available. Mess is self maintained by students so, its too good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Aircraft Maintenance Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college with everything.

review_content.Placements: The salary package offered is 1 LPA to 5 LPA. Most airlines like Vistara, Air Asia, etc., offer placements in our college. Around 50% of students get internships based on their skills.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs, and facilities are good in our college. Food served is good and the hostel provides facilities like water, canteen, and play area to play games after class hours. Our college will help students to improve their skills.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members in our college are helpful in teaching new things and skills. The course curriculum is relevant to the aviation sector and management studies. There are 6 semester exams at our degree level. The pass percentage is more than 60%.

reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with the infrastructure and faculty.

review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs, classroom, library, etc. are available. Teaching quality is good and all the instructors are well qualified. There is a great canteen and the food is good too. We used to play cricket, football, volleyball, tennis, etc. in the playground. They used to conduct tournaments occasionally.

content.Placements: There are no placements in this college (when I was there, no one was placed in any company till now through the college campus). About placement cell, we have only had bad experience. I can't recommend this college if someone needs placement through the college.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities at the college are impressive. We have 5 computer labs for the computer branch, and they maintain the labs well. Hostal, mess, and canteen are not available currently, but in 2023, they will provide everything. The permanent campus is very huge with a sports field also.

reviews.review_heading: It is a fantastic college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very well maintained. It has classrooms and a library. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled. The hostels' rooms are well-maintained because of their new building. The canteen is also available here.

reviews.review_heading: In this college, students are doing well. I would recommend taking admission.
reviews.review_text: The construction is still going on. There are building 4 buildings primarily for academics and hostel in campus smart classes. The seminar hall and playground are of good quality.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty is good. But the infrastructure is not good as compared to other college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good as compared to Bihar college. Wi-Fi is available through out the campus but there is major problem in electricity. They have good labs especially for civil and electrical student for CS student also there are good labs. Ground is not so much big.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides us with all facilities. The hostel is average. Our college is Wi-Fi enabled. The hostel is neat. The hostel doesn't have a generator. The food served in the mess is not good.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Jan Nayak Ch.Devi Lal Vidyapeeth - JCDV.

review_content.Placements: In our course there are a total of 100 seats are available and almost all seats are filled by the counseling conducted by PGIMS, Rohtak. The highest salary package offered to students is 16 LPA -18 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 10 LPA - 12 LPA. Generally, in dentistry, students are self-employed in their hospitals or join popular dentist clinics. The topmost role offered in our course is a dentist.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our classrooms, we have both screen projectors, as well as green boards so that students can clear doubts as per their needs. Teachers used to make diagrams in an easy way and give us a clear version of the topic they are going to teach as well. We have labs with sufficient equipment so that no student lacks behind in case of practical work. Our library is a room of knowledge where we can find the same subject books with different writers according to our preference.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with the college environment, staff members, and teachers.

review_content.Placements: Almost 90% of students are from Sirsa city, and 10% of students are from villages. The highest salary package offered was 6 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was 1.5 LPA. The average salary package offered was 2.5 LPA. About 30% of students from our course got an internship. Infosys company visit our college for placements. A top role is offered by JCD Vidyapeeth.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides a good Wi-Fi facility in hostels, but average in the library. Facilities like sitting places and furniture are good as expected. The food available in the canteen and hostel is good. It also provides good medical facilities.

You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: If you are looking for the right college for your higher education, this can be a good option.

content.Placements: JCD Vidyapeeth College provides various kinds of job placement opportunities to the students, with job packages ranging from around 2 lakhs per annum to 4 lakhs per annum. The last top companies to visit our college were Tata Motors, Hyundai, Maruti Suzuki, Aditya Birla, etc.
content.Infrastructure: When it comes to facilities and infrastructure, JCD Vidyapeeth College is quite wonderful. The buildings are well-maintained, and facilities like food, Wi-Fi, canteen, labs, and the library are available for every student.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Dental college is a good and helpful if you are looking for BDS.

content.Placements: 85 students were placed. No package is provided yet. Stipends is provided to interns. No companies visit the campus for recruitments. 100% internship is guaranteed to the students. Stipend is a little bit low but it's okay. PG section is also available. Not only BDS, MS also available.
content.Infrastructure: No Wi-Fi is available in the college. Labs are available. AC is non working. Library is a nice place. Hostel is not good. Mess food is just average. No generator service is provided at the time of power cut. Gym is there. Park is there. Strictness is there. You can't exit the campus, if you are residing in girl's hostel.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

hostel_campus.college_name: Jan Nayak Ch.Devi Lal Vidyapeeth - JCDV Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: If you are looking for the right college for your higher education, this can be a good option.
reviews.review_text: When it comes to facilities and infrastructure, JCD Vidyapeeth College is quite wonderful. The buildings are well-maintained, and facilities like food, Wi-Fi, canteen, labs, and the library are available for every student.

reviews.review_heading: Dental college is a good and helpful if you are looking for BDS.
reviews.review_text: No Wi-Fi is available in the college. Labs are available. AC is non working. Library is a nice place. Hostel is not good. Mess food is just average. No generator service is provided at the time of power cut. Gym is there. Park is there. Strictness is there. You can't exit the campus, if you are residing in girl's hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Jan Nayak Ch.Devi Lal Vidyapeeth - JCDV.
reviews.review_text: In our classrooms, we have both screen projectors, as well as green boards so that students can clear doubts as per their needs. Teachers used to make diagrams in an easy way and give us a clear version of the topic they are going to teach as well. We have labs with sufficient equipment so that no student lacks behind in case of practical work. Our library is a room of knowledge where we can find the same subject books with different writers according to our preference.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college environment, staff members, and teachers.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides a good Wi-Fi facility in hostels, but average in the library. Facilities like sitting places and furniture are good as expected. The food available in the canteen and hostel is good. It also provides good medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is for acquiring good knowledge with very good staff members and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: All the departments are available with well-developed equipment, and all the basic and necessary needs are fulfilled. We get very good food and medical facilities here. The campus has its own shooting range, along with basketball ground, football ground, cricket ground and a few parks to keep students healthy.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Jan Nayak Ch.Devi Lal Vidyapeeth - JCDV.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. Our college provides a good hostel facility. There are many grounds. Gym facility is available here. Quality of food served is good. There are many parks, museum and football ground. There is a hospital on the campus. Dental college and various other colleges are also available here.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good, and it provides many facilities and helps students in their growth.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like air-conditioned classrooms, labs and a library with good quality internet are available. Air-conditioned rooms are available in the hostel with proper food, well cleaned, hygienic and also proper security is provided to the students for their safety. Sports like shooting, basketball, volleyball, etc., are available.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good facilities but poor placements.
reviews.review_text: As this is a private college, the fee structure is high. Facilities provided by the college are very good, like free Wi-Fi, A/C classrooms, library and medical facilities. A sports meet is conducted every year for students who interested in sports. The campus has a cricket academy as well.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best college of SIRSA.
reviews.review_text:
The classrooms are better than other colleges situated in SIRSA.
There is a computer lab and library. They organise sports events every year. The food available in the canteen is average.
The hostel rooms are good and I didn't face any problem related to the infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure and the campus crowd is great, dissatisfied with faculty and placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. It was a renowned campus. We usually skip classes just because we enjoy sitting outside of the college building just because of the greenery and cleanliness of the campus. The campus of our college is very famous in all nearby districts.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the faculty members, HOD's, and corrupt peoples. Please find any other colleges.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure on the campus is well-maintained but for electrical/electronic guys the machines they provided was too old and that too not working or full of bugs. For CSE, you will find good machines, but you need to install software as per need. For mechanical, the infrastructure is good.

reviews.review_heading: Jan Nayak Ch.Devi Lal Vidyapeeth is a very bad college.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good. There are building for different courses. Every building has the canteen. There is one common canteen also. The infrastructure-wise, this college is the best college in Sirsa and nearby Sirsa cities. The hospital is also available in the college.

reviews.review_heading: No placements,but only thing good in the college is its infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The only thing good in the college is its infrastructure. A large ans beautiful campus with a number of courses in it. The thing infrastructure lack is proper laboratories and the Wi-Fi does not world properly. The library also lacks some of the good facilities.

reviews.review_heading: JCD MBA- Just degree, not career.
reviews.review_text: The basic infrastructure is good. The classrooms are good enough, with poor, hard seats like in old schools. Only fans are there in 45°C, No new teaching aids. Old book and blackboard method is followed for teaching. Wi-Fi is available but it is hardly of any use. Computer lab is there with basic facilities. Not much scope for sports. The hostels are messy and are common for all groups of colleges, resulting in a lot of issues.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and environment .
reviews.review_text:
Good hostel food every student of hostel was humble in nature and good medical facilities was provide to the students also there was a gym in the hostel where we were do gym and maintain our health 
The hostel food was freshly prepared every day 
The quality of food was vell good.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: MGM College of Engineering And Technology, Ernakulam offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from stream such as Engineering. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech and After 10th Diploma. On the other hand, at the PG level, the MGM College of Engineering And Technology, Ernakulam offers M.E./M.Tech. The fees for MGM College of Engineering And Technology, Ernakulam courses range between INR 1,20,000 to 2,00,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: MGMCET, Pampakuda, is a well-known engineering college, where you can pursue a good career.

review_content.Placements: About 65% of students are placed in various companies. Many brilliant students are receiving placements in more than two or three companies. Companies like Infosys, Cognizant, Tech, Mahindra, IBM, Global and many other companies recruited fresher's from this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has a good infrastructure. The boys' hostel is located on campus, and the girls' hostel is located around 3 km from the college. The college provides bus facilities in many routes. A canteen is available at the boys' hostel, and the cafeteria is just near the B.Tech block.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has good faculty members and infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Mainly mechanical students don't have placement opportunities here, or only a few placements are provided like about 7% placements in the mechanical course. Top recruiting companies for our course include Infosys and many other IT field companies. The placement rate is very low, and the college offers only placement assistance to all students. Internships are available for most of the students, and students who qualify in the test are recruited by companies for 3 to 6 months duration of internships in various fields such as piping, etc. Small internships are useful for students to build their CV and as an extra skill in that field. Computer engineering students have more placements in our college, i.e., about 50% of the students get placed in Infosys and other leading IT companies.

faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses
faqs.question: Q: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?

faqs.answer: The subject that is tough for you might be very easy to study and grasp for your friend, who finds it interesting. For example, you may find Electromagnetic Wave Theory very tough because of the various technicalities and Engineering theory that it deals with. But, for your friend, it might be fun to learn, as it gives them a channel to learn, explore, and experiment with something new.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good faculty members.

content.Placements: Few students got placed in our course. Many top recruiting companies visit our college to hire students. Internships are also offered in this course. The top roles offered are plumber, mechanical, and marine engineer.
content.Infrastructure: There is no free Wi-Fi connection for students. Wi-Fi is available only for college needs. Our laboratory is good but there are few machines. Our classrooms are well-maintained with fans and lights. The library has many books.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It is a great college with good infrastructure.

content.Placements: More than 80% of students from our course get placed. The highest salary package offered is 18 LPA and the lowest salary package offered is 10 LPA. Interview rounds include group discussions, technical interviews, and the final round is the HR round.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi and the best facilities are provided in our college. There are great labs and classrooms. It has a very good basketball court, volleyball court, table tennis court, and a small ground for football and cricket. There is a huge library sponsored by Infosys.

content.Infrastructure: The college has a good infrastructure. The boys' hostel is located on campus, and the girls' hostel is located around 3 km from the college. The college provides bus facilities in many routes. A canteen is available at the boys' hostel, and the cafeteria is just near the B.Tech block.

individual_reviews.title: Our college has good faculty members and infrastructure.

Internships are available for most of the students, and students who qualify in the test are recruited by companies for 3 to 6 months duration of internships in various fields such as piping, etc. Small internships are useful for students to build their CV and as an extra skill in that field. individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of MGM College of Engineering and Technology, Ernakulam, Kerala.

content.Placements: The majority of computer science students will certainly get placement, But all other departments will struggle. Other branches like mechanical, civil, and EEE even have placements, but I've seen them struggle often due to lowkey placements and very low packages.
content.Infrastructure: It's not the big, fine campus you expect. Even the promo videos are fake which show you a great campus and complete greenery. You might think this is a green campus, but the actual condition is worse. You can see only a few trees all around the campus. Situated at the center is the ground, around which you can't find any trees for shade.

reviews.review_heading: Review of MGM College of Engineering and Technology, Ernakulam, Kerala.
reviews.review_text: It's not the big, fine campus you expect. Even the promo videos are fake which show you a great campus and complete greenery. You might think this is a green campus, but the actual condition is worse. You can see only a few trees all around the campus. Situated at the center is the ground, around which you can't find any trees for shade.

reviews.review_heading: Our college infrastructure is good. Facilities are average.
reviews.review_text: College facilities are average. No free Wi-Fi service is available in the college. Computer labs are okay, but other labs are average. Classrooms are average. The library has good facilities. The quality of facilities in the hostel is below average. The quality of the food served is very bad. Medical facilities are below average. Sports and games are average.

reviews.review_heading: MGMCET - Our college review.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is so good but the food is bad. We have Wi-Fi at labs, classrooms are okay, and library is also good. We have one computer lab which will be used by all departments. Only downside is the hostel facility. Hostel is good but the food is worse. It is what our seniors and friends told.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I honestly say that this is college for whom who can do anything in his/her own skills.

content.Placements: We got 50-60% placement from our college. We got the highest package like up to 6 LPA, and average package is 3 LPA, and the lowest is 1 LPA. We got companies like TATA, TWS, Infosys, etc. 60% of students get internship from our college in Infosys, TWS, etc. Roles like full-time employee, data analysis, web developer, etc., roles offered in our course.
content.Infrastructure: Our facilities and infrastructure of college is quite good. We also have Wi-Fi in our labs. Our classrooms have fans while our IT lab has AC. We also have a library for any type of mini project and reading. The management of hostel is also good, but our mess doesn't have any regular taste it changes day by day. Sometimes it's good and sometimes it's bad. We also have a sports complex, so in sports we are lucky.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The college is not worth it and does not support you unless you take part in their fests.

content.Placements: Many students are not placed. Some who do get placed don’t receive PPOs. First priority is given to the placement coordinators, and faculty members blame students for not performing well. They don’t help in getting placements. They just want results and nothing else.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is the worst. I don’t stay in the hostel, but I have seen the rooms, and they are the worst. Hygiene is not maintained in the hostel. You don’t even get a proper table to study. The mess is the worst of all. Some students find bugs in their food. Don’t take the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: I honestly say that this is college for whom who can do anything in his/her own skills.

Sometimes it's good and sometimes it's bad. We also have a sports complex, so in sports we are lucky.

reviews.review_heading: The college is not worth it and does not support you unless you take part in their fests.

You don’t even get a proper table to study. The mess is the worst of all. Some students find bugs in their food. Don’t take the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of the faculty, good placements in 2025, and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Hostel has all the facilities, from electricity to heaters. It also has Wi-Fi facilities. They also have smart classes to make learning easier for the students. The hostels have library facilities and a canteen; they also provide good medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Mbit College Review. Good Placement and Campus Life.
reviews.review_text: Campus infrastructure is very good and peaceful. Campus life of students is very good. There are facilities like modern labs and classrooms, auditorium, library, reading room, and many more. Hostel facilities are good and provide good food in the mess.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of behaviour among students.
reviews.review_text: The sports complex is the best thing here. Two underground levels is an insane thing for infrastructure. The campus is green too, and it also has a gym. It has a football ground, basketball ground, volleyball ground, and much more. Overall, the infrastructure is good, but the hostel mess is horrible.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with all the facilities and recommended for other students to take admission.
reviews.review_text: MBIT infrastructure is very good, with all facilities with an AC hall, library, and reading room, and a good and clean campus. In college, there are many different types of hostel AC and non-AC rooms with mess and non-mess. The college also provides transportation facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with faculty and Infrastructure .
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good facilities in terms of labs and classrooms. Infrastructure is good and appealing. Laboratories have high-end PCs and air conditioning, with proper lighting and comfortable chairs. Hostels have air conditioning, a garden, and proper security.

reviews.review_heading: Understanding MBIT from a Student's Perspective
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good compared to many other colleges providing the same course. The environment of the college campus is very light and green, especially in the monsoon season. The hostels are not up to the standards of the college.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely worth it. We successfully passed the CVM first batch.
reviews.review_text: The campus is equipped with advanced computer labs housing over 500 computers and laptops, ensuring ample resources for all the students. The library at MBIT is well-stocked with a vast collection of books, reference materials and academic journals. The hostel at MBIT offers a safe and comfortable living environment, regular maintenance services, and hygienic mess facilities that provide good meals.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, experience from taking admission to placement at MBIT.
reviews.review_text: Wi-fi facilities are available for college students. Classrooms are well maintained and clean. Classrooms also have smart boards and projectors for better learning. The college provides hostel facilities for boys and girls, including a mess facility. The college has two main departments: CE and IT.

reviews.review_heading: Review of MBIT (Anand) College.
reviews.review_text: The campus is huge, but it is inside the GIDC, which is sometimes difficult to travel to the city for the purchase of goods. The campus has 24*7 Wi-Fi facilities in their labs, library, and classrooms. The classrooms contain projectors to update the students with high-tech teaching. While the teaching quality is nice, the faculty has over 9 to 13 years of experience in teaching, and they are familiar with high-tech technologies, providing good education to the students. The mess food is not good...

reviews.review_heading: Get information about MBIT.
reviews.review_text: They provide enough books for reading college exams they have 24*7 Wi-Fi facility but it computer labs and all not in whole college. The classroom are decent it can be better there were dust here stand there. Hostel is good we have to share the room with 2 other people if you want the AC facility you have the option for that also but you have to pay for the AC bill as for the normal room it comes with 3 beds 1 bathroom 3 tables for studying and 3 cupboard for storage. The food quality is not tha...

reviews.review_heading: Very good infrastructure, but hostel and food are not good.
reviews.review_text: For the course, the infrastructure is nice, including the labs, classrooms, and library. All PCs in the lab are in very good condition, and the hostel building is old and good. During lunch, it is very good, but dinner is not good. It is value for money, as we are paying around 75 to 80 rupees per day.

reviews.review_heading: Very good infrastructure and good faculty, but dissatisfied with the hostel and mess.
reviews.review_text: For the course, the infrastructure is nice, including Wi-Fi, labs, digital classrooms, and libraries; all PCs in the labs are in very good condition; and in the hostel, buildings are very old, so the average food during lunch is very good, but at dinner it is average. I think it is value for money, as we are paying 80 rupees per day.

reviews.review_heading: Our faculty members are good but the mess food is not good.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a girls' hostel and a boys' hostel. The mess facility is good. If you don't want to join a hostel, you can consider a PG or rented room. The hostel facilities are good. If you enroll in a hostel, you must pay mess fees. The mess food is not good.

highlights.summary: Here are some additional updates regarding the J.T. Mahajan College of Engineering:

faqs.answer: A:    As per Shiksha verified reviews, J.T. Mahajan College of Engineering has an impressive review rating of 2.88 by 23 students.
faqs.question: How is the placement facility at J.T. Mahajan College of Engineering?

faqs.answer: A:    J.T. Mahajan College of Engineering is a good institution for B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Major specialisation at J.T. Mahajan College of Engineering are Civil Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Computer Science Engineering.
faqs.question: What specializations do J.T. Mahajan College of Engineering offer in their courses?

review_content.Department: 1. There are approximately 6–7 labs in our department with AC rooms and fast, accessible Wi-Fi. 2. Classrooms are also divided year-wise. In good condition. 3. Library: The very one thing in our college that gets my attention and impresses me is that my college library is very authentic, well managed and the vibe is like the student of the year movie wali library. Hostel : Specifically, I'm not a hostel student so I won't be able to give you an experienced review. But I have my friends opinions on this who are living in our college hostels. There are two hostel for our college. 1. Boys hostel Rooms with two buddymates have two beds in them, and every room has a balcony. Good facilities (water, electricity) 2. Muktai Girls Hostel It has best-in-class facilities and also has its own canteen in the hostel and a college canteen at night for girls safety. Room arrangements were also good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: It is an amazing college with good faculty, good infrastructure, and best placements in 2022.

review_content.Placements: Currently, I am a final year student and this year's placement was very good. With proper guidance from our professors, many students from our batch got placed in various companies with different roles, and based on their roles they got their salary packages. About 75% of students from our batch got placed. The highest salary package offered was around 4.80 LPA and the lowest salary package offered was 2.80 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Infosys, Tech Mahindra, and Wipro. About 50% of students got internships in various companies and roles offered are project engineer, digital engineer, and trainee.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: The overall experience is good and we can explore many things.

review_content.Placements: Our course has an excellent placement record, with 90% of the batch 2021-22. The lowest salary package is 3.5 LPA, the average is 4.47 LPA, and the highest is 6.6 LPA. It depends on the company and our skills. Top recruiting companies for our course are Google, Microsoft, TCS, Wipro, Capgemini, Tech Mahindra, Infosys, Accenture, Deloitte, IBM, etc. About 85% of students from our course have gotten internships at TCS, Wipro, and IBM. review_summary.college_name: J.T. Mahajan College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The trust of good looking college with bad facilities.

content.Placements: It has a very low rate of placements, not only in our batch but also in other batches and other departments. I think the highest package ever got in our college might be around 4 LPA. Less than 1% of the students get internships from the college. We have to find out the internships by ourselves. Top role that is offered in our course includes front-end developer. It depends on what courses we have completed during the college period.
content.Infrastructure: There are less computers in the computer department and some of them are not even working. There are 3 Wi-Fi in the college and we know the password of only one Wi-Fi and all the students use it so it works slowly. Facilities are very bad in the college. Benches have a lot of dirt on them. No proper drinking facility is there. We go to the canteen to drink water when not brought it from home. Canteen is like a mess. Students who have joined the mess have lunch in front of us. Sports and other games are just played on sports day.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Really the college celebrates great festive events.

content.Placements: If there are interested and prepared students, then the college placement office can arrange campus placements. The college will invite companies and startups to get interviews. Also, our college alumni also hire our freshly graduated students. 3.5 out of I'm looking for placements here.
content.Infrastructure: Department: 1. There are approximately 6–7 labs in our department with AC rooms and fast, accessible Wi-Fi. 2. Classrooms are also divided year-wise. In good condition. 3. Library: The very one thing in our college that gets my attention and impresses me is that my college library is very authentic, well managed and the vibe is like the student of the year movie wali library. Hostel : Specifically, I'm not a hostel student so I won't be able to give you an experienced review. But I have my friends opinions on this who are living in our college hostels. There are two hostel for our college. 1. Boys hostel Rooms with two buddymates have two beds in them, and every room has a balcony. Good facilities (water, electricity) 2. Muktai Girls Hostel It has best-in-class facilities and also has its own canteen in the hostel and a college canteen at night for girls safety. Room arrangements were also good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is an amazing college with good faculty, good infrastructure, and best placements in 2022.

content.Placements: Currently, I am a final year student and this year's placement was very good. With proper guidance from our professors, many students from our batch got placed in various companies with different roles, and based on their roles they got their salary packages. About 75% of students from our batch got placed. The highest salary package offered was around 4.80 LPA and the lowest salary package offered was 2.80 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Infosys, Tech Mahindra, and Wipro. About 50% of students got internships in various companies and roles offered are project engineer, digital engineer, and trainee.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: The overall experience is good and we can explore many things.

content.Placements: Our course has an excellent placement record, with 90% of the batch 2021-22. The lowest salary package is 3.5 LPA, the average is 4.47 LPA, and the highest is 6.6 LPA. It depends on the company and our skills. Top recruiting companies for our course are Google, Microsoft, TCS, Wipro, Capgemini, Tech Mahindra, Infosys, Accenture, Deloitte, IBM, etc. About 85% of students from our course have gotten internships at TCS, Wipro, and IBM. There are several roles offered in our course, like software developer, data analyst, web developer, full-stack developer, database administrator, information security, data engineer, system engineer, etc.

individual_reviews.title: Oue college has good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: The highest salary package is more than 15 LPA and the lowest salary package is 2.5 LPA. Placement cell is very active in bringing the companies. The average salary package offered is around 3 LPA. Academics are very good.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library everything is good. Hostel facility is good with special security arrangements for girl residents. Security guard is available 24x7 at the hostel. Students get free Wi-Fi, common rooms, and study areas.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to J.T. Mahajan College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: Direct admission exists within J.T. Mahanjan College of Engineering through the Management Quota, but the process and the requirements towards this quota differ according to the course and availability of seats. Usually, students have to pass their 12th grade with the required subjects, such as Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics, and meet the minimum percentages. Admission is often through management quota, which is available on a limited basis and at a higher fee than the regular merit admission, which usually takes place through scores of MHT-CET of Maharashtra or JEE-Main. For better information, approach the college about the procedure for admission.

review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel facility is not good. Classrooms do not have proper Wi-Fi. The library is not good. The hostel facilities are not good. The hostel management is not good.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are not helpful. Professors don't have enough knowledge. They are good. The course curriculum is good according to the industry. It does not make us ready for the industry. The exam pattern is not good. I secured a 7.29 CGPA.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: SVPCET is a good college.

review_content.Placements: About 75% of students in our college are placed.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel is good, and the food is excellent. It is one of the best colleges for students. The library is huge and whatever book you need is in the library.
review_content.Faculty: Core subjects are very difficult, but teachers are helpful during exam time. We must study extremely hard. There are a total of eight semesters. All semesters are difficult, but we need to read, write, and listen carefully to create a good environment for studying in college.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in Sri Venkatesa Perumal College of Engineering and Technology (SVPCET) for UG/PG courses?

rows: B.E. / B.Tech
Candidate must have passed Diploma in relevant stream from a recognised Institute.
UG Diploma

Candidates should have passed S.S.C. Examination (Class 10th) conducted by State Board of Secondary Education, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana or any other examination recognised as equivalent thereto by the Board of Secondary Education, A.P/TS. such as CBSE, ICSE, NIOS, A.P. Open School Society (APOSS), X class examination conducted by various State Boards of Secondary Education in India with Mathematics as one of the subjects.
Candidates belonging to NIOS/APOSS/Other Examinations recognised as equivalent to SSC by A.P. Govt. should have passed all the subjects including Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, with minimum of 35% marks in each subject.
Candidates who appeared or are appearing for SSC or equivalent examination being held in April/ May-2023, and whose results are yet to be declared can also apply.
There is no age restriction.
M.E./M.Tech

Candidate must have passsed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream and obtained at least 50% marks (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from an AICTE/UGC
approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto.
Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.
After 10th Diploma

Candidates should have passed S.S.C. Examination (Class 10th) conducted by State Board of Secondary Education, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana or any other examination recognised as equivalent thereto by the Board of Secondary Education, A.P/TS. such as CBSE, ICSE, NIOS, A.P. Open School Society (APOSS), X class examination conducted by various State Boards of Secondary Education in India with Mathematics as one of the subjects.
Candidates belonging to NIOS/APOSS/Other Examinations recognised as equivalent to SSC by A.P. Govt. should have passed all the subjects including Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, with minimum of 35% marks in each subject.
Candidates who appeared or are appearing for SSC or equivalent examination being held in April/ May-2023, and whose results are yet to be declared can also apply.
There is no age restriction.
MBA/PGDM

Candidate must have completed Bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute.
45% marks for BC categories.
Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible.
Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB.
Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.
MCA

Candidate must have passed Bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with Mathematics as one of the subject at Intermediate or Degree level with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute.
45% marks for BC categories.
Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible.
Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB.
Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.

overview_faqs.question: Is it worth to consider Sri Venkatesa Perumal College of Engineering and Technology (SVPCET) as a good Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Sri Venkatesa Perumal College of Engineering and Technology (SVPCET) is a reputed institute for B.Tech, UG Diploma, M.E./M.Tech, After 1th Diploma, MBA/PGDM, MCA. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Engineering, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. As per Shiksha verified reviews, Sri Venkatesa Perumal College of Engineering and Technology (SVPCET) has a rating of 3.8 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 3.8 on campuslife, 3.7 on placements, 3.9 on faculty and 3.7 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Sri Venkatesa Perumal College of Engineering and Technology (SVPCET) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Student life style at SVPCET .

content.Placements: Nearly 80% of the students were placed in the placements with a package of 4 LPA as the minimum package for the students. The highest package is 12 LPA. Almost all of the top companies, like WIPRO, TCS, CTS, HCL, TECH MAHINDRA, etc., visited the campus.
content.Infrastructure: Sri Venkatesa Perumal College of Engineering and Technology, Puttur, has provided students and staff with all the basic amenities with easy access. SVPCET Puttur facilities include boys' hostels, girls' hostels, medical, library, sports and many more.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Compared to other colleges in fee and study, our college is some what better.

content.Placements: In the 3rd year, the college provides TAP (Training and Placement). In that, they will teach programming and soft skills. For all departments, the TAP section will be and in coming to placements, the campus drives will be held based on our talent they will hire.
content.Infrastructure: There are 4 main computer labs in our college and 2 stimulation labs. The infrastructure is good and classrooms and seminar halls are also good. In coming to hostel, it is good and every semester 2 to 3 hostel events will be held and we have to adjust for hostel food.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Review of Sri Venkatesa Perumal College of Engineering and Technology (SVPCET).

content.Placements: I got placed in Infosys as a design engineer with a salary package of 3.6 LPA. Now, I am working as a front-end developer.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel facility is not good. Classrooms do not have proper Wi-Fi. The library is not good. The hostel facilities are not good. The hostel management is not good.
content.Faculty: Teachers are not helpful. Professors don't have enough knowledge. They are good. The course curriculum is good according to the industry. It does not make us ready for the industry. The exam pattern is not good. I secured a 7.29 CGPA.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: SVPCET is a good college.

content.Placements: About 75% of students in our college are placed.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is good, and the food is excellent. It is one of the best colleges for students. The library is huge and whatever book you need is in the library.
content.Faculty: Core subjects are very difficult, but teachers are helpful during exam time. We must study extremely hard. There are a total of eight semesters. All semesters are difficult, but we need to read, write, and listen carefully to create a good environment for studying in college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I'm satisfied because of the faculty and good placements in 2021.

content.Placements: I'm from the 2021 passed out batch with a mechanical background. Many top companies, like Hyundai and Tech Mahindra, hire people from our college. A good college to get a degree. The average salary package that was offered to us was 3 to 4 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has an outstanding atmosphere. The college is a little far from town, so there is no noise, there's absolute peace, and a great learning place. There are separate blocks for different batches. It has great infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: Student life style at SVPCET .
reviews.review_text: Sri Venkatesa Perumal College of Engineering and Technology, Puttur, has provided students and staff with all the basic amenities with easy access. SVPCET Puttur facilities include boys' hostels, girls' hostels, medical, library, sports and many more.

reviews.review_heading: Compared to other colleges in fee and study, our college is some what better.
reviews.review_text: There are 4 main computer labs in our college and 2 stimulation labs. The infrastructure is good and classrooms and seminar halls are also good. In coming to hostel, it is good and every semester 2 to 3 hostel events will be held and we have to adjust for hostel food.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sri Venkatesa Perumal College of Engineering and Technology (SVPCET).
reviews.review_text: The hostel facility is not good. Classrooms do not have proper Wi-Fi. The library is not good. The hostel facilities are not good. The hostel management is not good.

reviews.review_heading: SVPCET is a good college.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is good, and the food is excellent. It is one of the best colleges for students. The library is huge and whatever book you need is in the library.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied because of the faculty and good placements in 2021.
reviews.review_text: Our college has an outstanding atmosphere. The college is a little far from town, so there is no noise, there's absolute peace, and a great learning place. There are separate blocks for different batches. It has great infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: The college is really awesome. You also join it.
reviews.review_text: There is a good infrastructure, with the minimum, we have got a lab and library for our department separately and we have good classrooms and they are comfortable there is no Wi-Fi provided but we can access it in hostels. The food is very good and we have a basketball court and a playground.

reviews.review_heading: It has a good environment for studies.
reviews.review_text: In our college, all labs are excellent. Any time Wi-Fi is available in the hostel. The food served is very good. It provides each student with one bed and one locker. It provides 3 sharing rooms. There is a canteen inside the college 24x7.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good place to get placed on campus and has good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good facilities like proper labs i.e., we have 5 centers for computer labs, and we also have a library. Our campus also has a Wi-Fi facility. We have a physical department where we have many games to play, and we have a canteen and a medical room also.

reviews.review_heading: A well-equipped Engineering College for better placements.
reviews.review_text: In our college, there is no fault in the facilities that they provide for us. Everything is absolutely fine like WI-FI, Classrooms and also in Library, we can find anything that we want related to our subjects and also faculty is available for clarification in the library itself. Every student can gain some knowledge about the subjects in labs aslo by experimental way. So, the students can know about the subjects in practical and theoretical ways. And the college hostel is also good, the facilit...

reviews.review_heading: It is a well-organised institution with the best placement support.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good and well furnished with all the requirements like Wi-Fi, laboratories, and classrooms are very clean. The library and auditorium are also good. Hostel atmosphere is good, but the food maintenance was not good. The canteen environment is good, and there are poor medical facilities. We have a good space for sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: I will suggest you join SVPCET college, which is good.
reviews.review_text: In our college, there is a digital platform where there are computers and also books. There is a huge study room where we can sit and read books. During 4 years, I stayed in the hostel, and the facilities provided in the hostel were good. They provided Wi-Fi, and the food served was average. In the hostel, there is a safe and secure environment.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and very good faculty, and the teaching quality is good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. B.Tech, M.Tech, Diploma, MBA, and MCA are the available courses in our college. Hostel rooms and food are good. The hostel management cares about students, their studies and behaviour. The students feel like home here.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for you if you want to gain knowledge as well as placements.
reviews.review_text: When compared to other colleges in and around the Chittoor district, SVPCET is one of the good colleges with good lab equipment, a library, and a Wi-Fi connection. I have attended many labs during my course. I have not faced any issues regarding Wi-Fi. In labs like EDC, ACS, and DCS, there are no multiple kits. It may be one or two, but it works well.

reviews.review_heading: Well organised institute with the best placement support.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure was good and well furnished with all requirements like Wi-Fi, library, auditorium, labs, ground. 
The hostel was average with low quality of food and maintenance.  
The canteen environment was nice. Poor medical facilities. Good space for sport's and cultural activities
.

reviews.review_heading: It has a very good peaceful environment, well-experienced teachers and good placements every year.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very attractive and good. Our college library has a good infrastructure with a good Wi-Fi facility. Classrooms are also good. The hostel is small, and the food served is also average. The canteen has a menu of fried rice, meals, tiffins and snacks. The food served in the canteen is average, and the cost is high compared to outside. Medical facilities are available. Our college ground is small with a basketball court and sports of cricket and volleyball.

highlights.summary:
The JEE Main 2026 registration for session 2 has closed for Mahaveer Institute of Technology admission to BTech, BArch and BPlan courses. The session 2 exams will be conducted from Apr 2 to Apr 9, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Mahaveer Institute of Technology offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Mahaveer Institute of Technology offers MBA/PGDM. The fees for Mahaveer Institute of Technology courses range between INR 1,00,800 to 2,44,800.

faqs.answer: A:    Mahaveer Institute of Technology offers Degree and Diploma courses including 4 UG and 1 PG courses. Additionally, it also has After 10th Diploma courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. Mahaveer Institute of Technology has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, After 10th Diploma specializations in Civil Engineering, Production Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics Engineering, Electrical Engineering.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Electronic Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Please choose a better option.

review_content.Placements: There were no placement companies that came for placements in my year. The placement rate was 0% because no companies visited. Students had to find placements on their own, using their own resources. Recruitment companies only started coming after several years, and the companies were not leading brands in it.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities here were not so good. Classrooms were below average and had not been updated over time. There were no hostels available for students, so they had to search for rental places to live. In the canteen, only three or four drinks were available. There was only one snack available.

reviews_list.review_title: Somewhat dissatisfied because of some faculty and management.

review_content.Placements: Placements are going well when compared to last years this year we are lucky because college is giving their best support in placements. Not only the software side but also from the mechanical side we are getting placements from different companies. Management is giving placement training also.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus contains three blocks each block has four floors and one big library too. In the main block, there are software people and in the next block mechanical and civil students are there. And labs are separate for every branch and they are good and large enough.

content.Placements: Only a few placements. In some academic years, we have no placements. External drives will be conducted each and every year. review_summary.college_name: Om Engineering College, Junagadh Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It provides excellent education and exposure to civil engineering and all branches.

content.Placements: Around 80-90% of students from our batch got placed in reputable companies. The highest package ranges from 5-6 LPA, and the average package ranges from 3-4 LPA. Some top recruiting companies like L&T, Tata, Hindustan Construction Company, and Gammon India visit the college for placements.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has well-equipped labs with the latest software. There are Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms and campus. The central library has a vast collection of books. It has clean classrooms, hygienic fast food, a canteen and also medical facilities. There are playgrounds and sports like indoor or outdoor door games with a fresh environment.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college in this city.

content.Placements: Placements were not good. Around 10% of students got placements in local companies like Rajkot, Junagadh, etc. There were no good recruiting companies. The role offered was the contractual staff. I do not recommend students join this college for placements.
content.Infrastructure: Our college had good infrastructure and hostel facilities. Wi-Fi was available sometimes but it was not working for students. Classrooms were good but not air-conditioned. Food quality was average. They served meals twice and snacks once a day.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Chemical Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It does not provide good teaching.

content.Placements: In the chemical engineering course, there are no placements. None of the students from our course got an internship. Even I am in the final year of the chemical engineering course, but I did not get an opportunity for the internship. Roles are offered in our course.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure in our college is moderate. There is no good quality of labs, Wi-Fi, and classrooms. The library is good with a bad librarian. Hostel facility is not available here. The quality of food served in the canteen is moderate.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Quality education with proper management fully satisfied and value for money.

content.Placements: In Om Engineering College every year near about 97% of students get placement. There are 95% of students who get an internship in well-known companies and they are providing the highest package near about 3.5 lacks and the lowest package is near about 1.5 lacks per annum.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are well furnished. It contains a big library and the infrastructure is too good. The campus is fully wi-fi. Sports facilities are also available. There many big event held here. There different types of labs are thereso we recommend to study here.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Good engineering college in Junagadh to study engineering.

content.Placements: The placement percent of students in our college is 70 to 75%. And the highest package of our course ranges between 12000 to 16000 per month. The top recruiting companies for our course is Adani power limited. Top roles offered is Junior Engineer.
content.Infrastructure: There are Wi-Fi labs and also internet is free to use while studying. There is a big library with 50,000 engineering books. That can help you to study and develop the knowledge. And in campus, we have a big canteen which has many food items in the food menu. We get the events for sports and games every year.

review_summary.college_name: Government Engineering College, Krishnarajpet Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with infrastructure and faculty but not with placement.

content.Placements: Our batch come under 21 scheme, there is no guarantee of placement but one of the senior placed in TCS got package offered maybe of 3 to 4 LPA. But in our batch till now no company has arrived for placement. Only TCS came for YEP program. Qspider is arriving let's see how many of us get an opportunity
content.Infrastructure: Labs, library and classrooms are properly available but there is no wifi connection for students. In hostel I can rate food 4 out of 5. You can select this hostel because it's located within campus so it's safer than other. Students must be there within 6'o'clock.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Economically disadvantaged and local members can secure a degree here

content.Placements: Less campus placement, few companies visited. Not all departments are visited by good and standard companies; only a few companies come, and fewer people are selected. The rest of the students have to search for opportunities outside, including internships from reputed companies.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good, but neatness is not maintained in washrooms; classrooms are okay. Due to recent government operations, we received projectors, which may lead to better and faster teaching. The hostel is acceptable, allowing students from outside the district to stay.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It is a very good college for financially weak students, and a good number of students get placed.

content.Placements: In our college, around 50% of students get placed in good companies with good salary packages. Some of the companies are TCS, Wipro, Infosys, and L& T. We have done internships in Government Tool and Training Center in Maddur.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has a library with lots of books. Classrooms are well-equipped with neatness, and laboratories have good equipment. It has a canteen which serves good and hygienic food. It also has a sports department with a gym.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good infrastructure, facilities and faculty members.

content.Placements: For an engineering student, placements are important for a career. Faculty members help students to prepare for placements. TCS company will also be authorised with our college for helping students to prepare for placements. Every year nearly 10 to 15 students get opportunities from companies like TCS, etc. The highest salary package offered is 3.5 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Laboratories and classrooms have a good environment. The library is good. The hostel is well-maintained. The food is good and hygienic. Students play sports games like kho-kho, cricket, tennis, carrom board, etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with faculty members.

content.Placements: Many students got placed in our course in various companies. The highest salary package offered is 12 LPA in VLSI company. The lowest salary package offered is 1.80 LPA in KYNES company. Students got internships in GTTC and Microtree Tech Solutions.
content.Infrastructure: Laboratories are good. Classrooms are very comfortable to sit in. The hostel facilities are good in our college. We have a BCM hostel in this region so we can easily join the hostel.
content.Faculty: Teachers are helpful, well-qualified, and knowledgeable. Their teaching quality is good. They explain everything in a short time. It is not difficult to pass exams. The passing mark is 35 out of 100. It is shortened to 60 marks. We have to score 21 marks out of 60 marks.

labs.description: Available Facilities: Computer Lab, Electrical Lab, Electronics Lab

reviews.review_heading: A college without any fests and extra activities.
reviews.review_text: There is a separate library for the department. A single library is present for all branches. The quality of food is better than that of other colleges. The Wi-Fi facility is available for both the college and the hostel. Limited sports facilities are available in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Better college with no placement.
reviews.review_text: There is no separate library for different branches. There is a single library for all branches. Not many books are available; only a few books are available in the library. The sports facilities are limited, but the quality of the food is better compared to other colleges.

reviews.review_heading: Better college with no campus placement.
reviews.review_text: The limited sports facilities are available in the college. The entire college has only one library. There is no separate library for different branches. The small canteen is available in the hostel. No outside food is allowed into the hostel. The doctor will come twice to the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Better college but the worst environment.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is better when compared with other colleges. The food in hostel is better than in other colleges. Wi-Fi facility is available in the hostel. In college, the doctor will come twice a week to the hostel premises. The small junk food canteen is available.

reviews.review_heading: A better college for students security.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facility is good when compared with other colleges, but the canteen only offers Kurkure packets and biscuits. Outside food is strictly not allowed into the hostel, and a guard is available in the guard room of the hostel. Guests are not allowed into the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: The worst college, but good for studies.
reviews.review_text: The food at this college is good when compared to other colleges' hostels. The Wi-Fi is available in the hostel. The library is a single library for all the branches available in the college. There is no separate library for each branch. The quality of food is good and of good hygiene.

reviews.review_heading: The college has a better environment when compared with other colleges.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is better than the hostels of other colleges. The food is good in comparison. Wi-Fi is available in the hostel, and the library is available for all branches in the college. There is no separate library for single branches. The classrooms are good.

reviews.review_heading: College doesn't have a good environment.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is good when compared with other colleges. The food is better when compared with other colleges. Wi-Fi is available in hostel. There is no department library. The entire library is for all the branches in the college. The canteen is not available in college.

reviews.review_heading: The college is not good for students who are good at studying.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is better than the other colleges' hostels. The food at the hostel is better when compared with other colleges. The one library is available for the entire college. Wi-Fi is available in both the hostel and in college. The small canteen is available, but no outside food is available.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied at the starting of college, but fully satisfied because of 70% of students got placed.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides facilities like a Wi-Fi connection for both college and hostel members. Classrooms are available for the students, and a library is provided where they can go anytime to improve their practical knowledge and also have various other facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Better college, good, not too bad.
reviews.review_text: The facilities of the college are not too good. The facilities of the hostel are better when compared with those of other colleges. The electronic and communication engineering department faculty are stricter when compared with other department faculty. The food at the hostel is better.

reviews.review_heading: The college infrastructure is good, and the facilities are good.
reviews.review_text: The quality of the hostel is hygienic. The rooms and food are very good. Every week, a doctor comes to the hostel to check the students. Sports like kho-kho, kabaddi, volleyball, football, shuttle, and table tennis are also available. Every year, the sports team goes to state and national kabaddi competitions.

reviews.review_heading: Not good to join our college.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is too good and safe for girls. Food is good when compared with other colleges, and we must pay a monthly mess bill to hostel management.

reviews.review_heading: Lack of faculty and facilities in college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good. Buildings are very bold and big. Facilities in hostel are good, and quality of food available in mess and canteen is nice. Medical facilities are even good, and doctor is arriving every week and have a very large ground.

reviews.review_heading: Women's need to improve their skills and also be coders.
reviews.review_text: There are no issues in playing games because here the big ground is there for the college Bapatla. Facilities are super and the washrooms should be hygienic. The quality of the food is too good with respect to all types of items at the college.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, Kalasalingam Institute of Technology offers a diverse range of progammes. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like M.E./M.Tech. The Kalasalingam Institute of Technology course fee ranges between INR 1,00,000 to 2,00,000.
