review_summary.college_name: Kalasalingam Institute of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the infrastructure of our college.

content.Placements: Around 50% of students got placed in the year 2021. The highest salary package offered was 6.5 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was 3 LPA. They brought a lot of reputed companies that provided internships for students during the semester.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms and lab facilities are good in our college. Hostel rooms are spacious and well-maintained. Food served in the canteen and mess is average compared to other college hostels. They provided three messes namely, south Indian mess, Andhra mess, and north Indian mess.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied with sports events but good in placements and faculty really good infrastructure.

content.Placements: About 50% of students were placed in our course. The highest package is 6 LPA, the lowest package is 2 LPA, and the average package is 4-5 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Zoho visited our college. Nearly 50% of students got internships as Software engineers, and data analysts our college is deemed with anna university so 5 placements can be assured.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi speed is average, classrooms are good library also good. The hostel was very good but fees are a bit high and the quality of food seems to be average, mess and canteen facilities are outstanding as well as medical facilities good. On other hand, there is no such importance regarding sports.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Good college, good faculty and good placements

content.Placements: -- There are a lot of companies which appeared in my college, but half of the companies are BPOs and remaining are core companies. -- Highest - 6 lakhs per annum. -- Lowest - 1 lakh per annum. -- Average - 2.5 lakhs per annum. -- Companies like Amazon, Cogzidel, Wipro, Tech Mahindra, Kotak Mahindra, Zealous, etc. -- Some are having roles of software engineers and some having a technical work and some having bank works. -- The college gave a permission for the internship but students only have to aim for that, and in my batch, totally 5 students got the internship out of 100 students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good at placements with best faculty.

content.Placements: 87% students placed in placements in our college and it has 30 th position among all colleges. The highest package is 50.5 Lacs in our university. The lowest is 5lakhs is our university. Top recruiting company is Infosys last year Internship percent 78% Programing roles offered in our courses.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is very good. Labs are excellent and all equipment is available. Classrooms are very good. Library are very good. Medical facilities are good. Moreover hospital is available inside the hostel Lot of cattens are available. Proper ground space is given for students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Our college has a good environment.

content.Placements: Almost 60% to 70% of students were placed. The highest salary package offered was 10 LPA, and the average was 4.5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi and classrooms were fine. The library was good. The hostel was fine. There was a playground. Sports like cricket, hockey, volleyball, football, and kho-kho were available.
content.Faculty: Around 80% of attendance was mandatory. The pass percentage was 50%. The course curriculum was relevant and provided knowledge.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good infrastructure and facilities. Teachers are not much knowledgeable.

content.Placements: I was from the 2012 batch of B.Tech in computer science course. Only 4 to 5 students got placements from this college, and the salary package offered is also not good. Top MNCs do not show interest in visiting the college for internships or placements. Overall, placements in our college are below average.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is well designed. There is a huge library and properly maintained labs with a Wi-Fi facility. There is 24 hours of water supply and electricity facility in the hostel. There is a safe environment to study in the hostel. In the mess, good quality food is available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: The faculty members here are very knowledgeable.

content.Placements: Placements are awesome in my college. It is about 75-85% and the highest package is around 10 LPA, lowest is 3 LPA and the average package offered is 6 LPA. Companies like TCS, Infosys, Accenture, Wipro, Yamaha, Mahindra, Honda, Maruti Suzuki, etc. visited the college. 60-70% of the students gets internship from the college.
content.Infrastructure: All the classrooms are fully Wi-Fi enabled and ours labs are very good. The mechanical lab is very big in our region. Our library is very wide with large number of books. Musical facilities are very good in our college. We have many playgrounds. The quality of food in our canteen and the mess is very good and delicious. Our hostel rooms are awesome with many facilities like AC, fully Wi-Fi enabled and pure water.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2015

content.Other: I study in MIT, Aurangabad. It is a very unique college in Marathwada. I like the campus and the campus life of MIT College. But the fees is very high, therefore sponsoring the education here becomes very difficult. MIT college offers many courses such as BE, MBA, B-TECH, Polytechnic and many more.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: I do not recommend you join this college if you want to get placement.

content.Placements: Some companies visit our campus for placements, but it is not encouraging. The salary package offered was low, and the BPO job offers are more here. According to my memory, two companies visit our college and hired just 2-4 candidates. In our batch, we had about 400 students.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is huge, as it comprises of 2 more colleges, i.e., architecture and another is B.Tech. Wi-Fi facility was not available here. The library had a good amount of books. The workshop was fully equipped. The only good thing was the scenery around the campus, and it gets beautiful during monsoon.

paragraphs: Marathwada Institute of Technology admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, Marathwada Institute of Technology considers scores in JEE Main, CUET, and CUET-PG for admission to specific courses.Marathwada Institute of Technologyoffers courses at the UG, PG and After 10th levels.
The college offers UG programmes for 3 years - 4 years. For programmes at PG level, the duration is 2 years.
The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 2,20,000 - 2,44,800. Likewise, the PG programmes fee isINR 1,22,400 - 1,28,000. Students can pay the fee amount via online or offline mode.
Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.

review_summary.college_name: Chandravati Group of Institutions (C.G.I, Bharatpur) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech.) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Placements were good in 2016 and above 40 students were placed.

content.Placements: Above 30% of students got placed in each core engineering department. In this college, the highest salary package offered was 12 LPA, the lowest salary package offered was 3 LPA, and the average salary package offered was around 8 LPA. Top multinational companies like Infosys, Piramal, Lava, and other companies recruited students.
content.Infrastructure: There were around 25 classrooms and labs in our college. There was one library in this college. There were Wi-Fi facilities available. There were available facilities in our hostel. The quality of food is much better than in other government colleges. There were facilities for games and sports. Medical facilities were also available on campus.

individual_reviews.course: Polytechnic - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: This college is good for day scholars.

content.Placements: The college doesn't provide placement opportunities for branches like mechanical and civil. I have completed my diploma, but I didn't get placed. The polytechnic course is offered in only three departments namely civil, mechanical, and electrical.
content.Infrastructure: The building in the college is quite good as compared to other colleges in the city. The furniture in the classrooms is good. Playgrounds are available to conduct sports activities that are organised here.
content.Faculty: Faculty members of the college are average as some faculty members have quite good skills. But some of the faculty members are below average, considering their positions. Overall, the faculty section is not good in the college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech.) - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: This is an average college.

content.Placements: The college provides placement opportunities only for the students of the CS department, but not for the core branches like mechanical and civil. The faculty members are not good concerning the course. Some of the teachers are good, but they need to hire many good faculty members.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. The building is not that big, but it is good for academics. The campus is not fully Wi-Fi enabled, and the college provides Wi-Fi facility only in one building. Some labs are good, but some labs don't have the required equipment.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech.) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with all the facilities.

content.Placements: Lots of students got placed in various companies. A lot of companies visit the college campus. The salary package ranges from 5 LPA to 12 LPA. They offer highly appreciated roles to students. The placement ratio is good.
content.Infrastructure: There is free Wi-Fi service for students. Labs are very good. There are around 1 lakh books in the library. The medical facilities are available in campus and ambulance is also available. Sports facilities are really good. There is a playground for lots of sports like cricket, badminton, athletics, table tennis etc.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech.) - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Try for NITs & IITs if you are good in the study or for good private universities. Best of luck.

content.Placements: There are no placements in this college. All pass out students take coaching classes for the government jobs like SSC, CGL, GATE, IES, Bank PO or some students join private companies or most of them at home. So, please don't take the admission in this college because it is good for you and your parents.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good, and not bad. The Wi-Fi facilities are available in the college, but the library has old books, and there are no standard good books. The classrooms are good, but there is no equipment or projectors for the digital studies. There are no medical facilities. No sports. The labs have all the equipment and machines but not in working conditions. There is no canteen in this college. The hostel rooms are average with double sharing.

reviews.review_text: The building in the college is quite good as compared to other colleges in the city. The furniture in the classrooms is good. Playgrounds are available to conduct sports activities that are organised here.

reviews.review_heading: This is an average college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. The building is not that big, but it is good for academics. The campus is not fully Wi-Fi enabled, and the college provides Wi-Fi facility only in one building. Some labs are good, but some labs don't have the required equipment.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with all the facilities.
reviews.review_text: There is free Wi-Fi service for students. Labs are very good. There are around 1 lakh books in the library. The medical facilities are available in campus and ambulance is also available. Sports facilities are really good. There is a playground for lots of sports like cricket, badminton, athletics, table tennis etc.

reviews.review_heading: Try for NITs & IITs if you are good in the study or for good private universities. Best of luck.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, and not bad. The Wi-Fi facilities are available in the college, but the library has old books, and there are no standard good books. The classrooms are good, but there is no equipment or projectors for the digital studies. There are no medical facilities. No sports. The labs have all the equipment and machines but not in working conditions. There is no canteen in this college. The hostel rooms are average with double sharing.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure and facilities are good and environment of campus is great.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good and the facilities are also good on campus. A Wi-fi facility is also available on campus. Labs and classrooms are also good and have a library with every book available from the courses that are offered by the college. Food quality in the mess is good, and medical facilities, sports and games are played on campus by students.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Bheema Institute of Technology and Science offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from stream such as Engineering. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech and UG Diploma. Whereas, at PG level, Bheema Institute of Technology and Science offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech. Bheema Institute of Technology and Science fee structure for all the courses is around INR 72,000 to 1,60,000.

review_summary.college_name: Bheema Institute of Technology and Science Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Review of Bheema Institute of Technology and Science.

content.Placements: About 75% of students were placed in our course. The highest salary package was 5.5 LPA, the lowest was 2.8 LPA, and the average was 3.5 LPA. Recruiters were Infosys, TCS, Capgemini, and Mphasis. Around 30% of students got internships.
content.Infrastructure: Our department provided Wi-Fi and digital classrooms. There were many books in the library. The quality of our hostel was excellent. There were clean washrooms. They served hygienic and tasty food.
content.Faculty: Teachers were helpful. They had in-depth knowledge of their subjects. The teaching quality was excellent. Semester exams were easy because of the teaching style. The pass percentage was high.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college for students who have poor economic background..

content.Placements: As of now, around a hundred students got placed in its sector on the college campus. College management provides pre-training for the passed out students. It helps a lot during the interview process as well as during the written test. Some of the top companies had visited our college were Wipro, Infosys, and Tech Mahindra.
content.Infrastructure: As I am an Electrical engineering student, the lab facilities were good, and we can learn something practical. The college campus food is a homely one, and the college has a good ground facility and has a good volleyball court, badminton court, and we can play cricket too.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Really a nice college and I recommend to join in our college.

content.Placements: We are trained to be placement-ready since the very first semester. Most companies keep the initial eliminating criteria as aptitude and our placement staff works hard every semester to cover all kinds of aptitude. My batch got the highest package till date- 30LPA, from Amazon which is a dream-come-true for every student. Apart from aptitude, there are levels of tests that evaluate us on how equipped we are with technical knowledge and aptitude alike. The average salary this year is 5-6LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is beautifully designed, everything is so spacious. We have all the necessary facilities that one requires in a college. The labs are well-equipped and have state-of-art technologies. We have an amazing concept of Makerspace lab that has 3D printers, laser cutters, and all equipment you require to make your ideas come to life. The hostel is good, and the food provided in canteen and hostel mess is good. We have a vast auditorium that can hold up to 1000 people at any time.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: In my opinion, it is an average college.

content.Placements: Only 4% of the students got a job in 2015. The starting salary offered ranges from Rs. 15,000-20,000 per month. At our time, Mahindra company visited our college for placements. Few students got an internship at the college. I am not satisfied with the project work.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is better. Library, labs and classrooms are good. The hostel facility is good. Food served to the students is better. Our college provides average sports and good medical facilities. The canteen is average. Wi-Fi facility was not available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college for students.

content.Placements: Above 80% of the students in our course got placed. The salary offered to the students is Rs. 25,000 per month. The college offer courses like EEE, civil, CSE and mechanical. For our course, the college conducted an industrial trip for the coal plant.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides facilities like labs, classrooms, library, canteen, sports and games. Classrooms are neat and clean. The college surroundings are the best. Trees are planted there. Xerox facility is also available. The library is excellent. All facilities are available. The drinking water facility is also available, and the canteen is also available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Bheema Institute of Technology and Science.
reviews.review_text: Our department provided Wi-Fi and digital classrooms. There were many books in the library. The quality of our hostel was excellent. There were clean washrooms. They served hygienic and tasty food.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for students who have poor economic background..
reviews.review_text: As I am an Electrical engineering student, the lab facilities were good, and we can learn something practical. The college campus food is a homely one, and the college has a good ground facility and has a good volleyball court, badminton court, and we can play cricket too.

reviews.review_heading: Really a nice college and I recommend to join in our college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is beautifully designed, everything is so spacious. We have all the necessary facilities that one requires in a college. The labs are well-equipped and have state-of-art technologies. We have an amazing concept of Makerspace lab that has 3D printers, laser cutters, and all equipment you require to make your ideas come to life. The hostel is good, and the food provided in canteen and hostel mess is good. We have a vast auditorium that can hold up to 1000 people at any time.

reviews.review_heading: In my opinion, it is an average college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is better. Library, labs and classrooms are good. The hostel facility is good. Food served to the students is better. Our college provides average sports and good medical facilities. The canteen is average. Wi-Fi facility was not available.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for students.
reviews.review_text: The college provides facilities like labs, classrooms, library, canteen, sports and games. Classrooms are neat and clean. The college surroundings are the best. Trees are planted there. Xerox facility is also available. The library is excellent. All facilities are available.  The drinking water facility is also available, and the canteen is also available.

reviews.review_heading: Good College with good Students.

The canteen is the worst in the college, only snack items available in the canteen, Hostel rooms are good at rainy season.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with faculty but not satisfied with placements.

Canteen is not good in our college, Hostel is good for only boys, No I don't face that type of issues there.

reviews.review_heading: Information about BITS college.

There is only one block for all the departments in the college. Recently, a diploma is also added to the same block. There is no good seminar hall in the college. The classrooms are wide, but benches are ...

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Overall, it offers an excellent package except for teachers.

content.Placements: Most of the students got a good I can say the best package. Many students got placed with a package of above 15 LPA. Some top recruiting companies like Debar, Tata Steel, and Reliance hire students. About 70-80% of students got internships or job recruitment from top companies.
content.Infrastructure: Everything is fine. I like everything, and I didn't face any problems with any facility. Sometimes, Wi-Fi got stuck, which is not really a big issue. The quality of the food is good. The hostel service is provided by the college, but charges are pretty high so I opted for a PG.

individual_reviews.course: Integrated B.Sc. + M.Sc. in Forensic Science - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and facilities, faculty members are very skillful and have great knowledge.

content.Placements: Currently, we are the first batch of our college for the integrated course. But I know my seniors, they have great internship opportunities in various companies and Gujarat police also from cybersecurity department. As a bachelor student, I did an internship at DFS Gandhinagar in MAY 2024.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is really good. It is well-maintained. Labs are fresh. The instruments are new and many more are coming. Hostel is good. The mess is also quite good compared to other colleges. I visited during my admission process.

content.Infrastructure: The quality of facilities in my course is good. Food quality, canteen availability, and medical facilities are available, which include sports and games. individual_reviews.title: College is under NFSU's charge so, many things have been changed. One can try.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it offers an excellent package except for teachers.
reviews.review_text: Everything is fine. I like everything, and I didn't face any problems with any facility. Sometimes, Wi-Fi got stuck, which is not really a big issue. The quality of the food is good. The hostel service is provided by the college, but charges are pretty high so I opted for a PG.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Narnarayan Shastri Institute of Technology – Institute of Forensic Sciences and Cyber Security (IFSCS)
reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities, faculty members are very skillful and have great knowledge.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is really good. It is well-maintained. Labs are fresh. The instruments are new and many more are coming. Hostel is good. The mess is also quite good compared to other colleges. I visited during my admission process.

reviews.review_heading: Narnarayan Shastri Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: The quality of facilities in my course is good. Food quality, canteen availability, and medical facilities are available, which include sports and games. There are hostel facilities. The facilities and infrastructure available for my department include labs, classrooms, Wi-Fi, and the library.

reviews.review_heading: Best ever college for me .
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is also average with neat and clean areas. Wi-Fi is available all around the campus, labs, classrooms, and big library with important books, and multiple grounds and courts to play. The facilities of the hostel are good and cheap. The quality of food is like home food.

reviews.review_heading: College is under NFSU's charge so, many things have been changed. One can try.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi available for students. Classrooms are also average though bigger in size. Library is also average but labs are good and have well-equipped devices in them. Hostels are good enough to live. Canteen is good, everyone likes the food as lunch is available every day for Rs. 60.

reviews.review_heading: I am the former in this college.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is very bad. Few necessary facilities are available for our course. Wi-Fi is available on our college campus but with very slow speed. Labs are very small. The classroom is not very good. In our college campus, there is a central library.

reviews.review_heading: Narnarayan Shastri Institute of Technology Mechanical Engineering.
reviews.review_text: There are sufficient facilities in my course that students need, like fire extinguishers, 4 to 6 exotic doors on the second hand, Wi-Fi, and the labs, proper classrooms, and library are there. There are comfortable, big rooms and sufficient facilities that they easily focus on their course. About the food, there are well-trained chefs at the national level.

reviews.review_heading: Narnarayan Shastri Institute of Technology review.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities in our campus are excellent and available to every student. We have free wifi, a library and a free canteen. We also have sports facilities and a sports field.

reviews.review_heading: They provide good and quality placement to everyone.
reviews.review_text: In college gender ratio is equivalent, even if our class girls' got first rank in college. College has good campus facilities, it also has canteens. We also celebrates sports week to encourage more students to participate into into sports. We have different events that includes debate and all other technical and non technical events. College also organizes different workshops to increase knowledge of students.

reviews.review_heading: mere,  30% students were placed after the completion of degree. Salary offered is 1.2 to 1.8 LPA.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very average, as there are 3 colleges with different courses in a single complex. Obviously, overcrowding leads to a poorly cleaned space on campus that is not hygienic. Tech building and also have sanitation facilities and water facilities provided in each department.

reviews.review_heading: Placements are very good in our college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course are pretty good; we have laptops in good working condition, the laptops in the labs are sufficient for everyone in the course, and the library is really good. The recent volumes can also be seen in the library. The canteen, medical, sports, and games facilities are really good, but unfortunately, we do not have a hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and lab equipments.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure offered for this course is really good. The lab equipments are very useful and sufficient for the students. Wi-Fi is available, but it is not accessible to the students. The hostel is okay and the food is acceptable. The college canteen’s food is good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is very good. Surroundings are also available to our departments. My departments have many facilities on campus, including a hostel and excellent labs for conducting workshops.

reviews.review_heading: Placements are average in our college.
reviews.review_text: All courses are available in college and here facilities are available for students. Hostels are available for both girls and boys in the campus. The food is good in campus hostels and the quality of food is good and best. Here classrooms are available.

reviews.review_heading: High placement recruitment rate.
reviews.review_text: The thing is, the infrastructure is so beautiful. All types of labs are there for practice, like furnaces, metallurgical, etc., with enough lab tools. The lab will be done under the respective incharges. Classrooms are good and there is a free library. Wi-Fi is available on campus only.
